extract: Scorbunny (Japanese: ヒバニー Hibanny) is a Fire-type Pokémon introduced in Generation VIII. It evolves into Raboot starting at level 16, which evolves into Cinderace starting at level 35. Along with Grookey and Sobble, Scorbunny is one of the three first partner Pokémon of Galar available at the beginning of Pokémon Sword and Shield. Along with Grookey and Sobble, it was the first Generation VIII Pokémon to be revealed to the public on February 27, 2019.
